objectives.text: Speak with Asala — the sacred ritual of the Gift of Water has been disrupted
The Sel Khari, guardians of the ritual, have mysteriously vanished — investigate
Search for the missing Sel Khari guardians
Uncover who stole the Barya and disrupted the sacred water ritual

notes: Penultimate boss — interlude level does not scale from this kill

objectives.text: Find and kill Azmadi, the Faridun Prince (act boss)
